description: Psalms in Hebrew written in Arabic script. The beginning of the text on the verso is to be found at the end of the leaf at which the text of the recto finishes.  The scribe turned the leaf over around its horizontal axis in order to continue on the verso. 16.8cm. and 15cm. between the top and bottom lines.  Two small lacunae. Recto: (Ps. 35:2-37:39). Verso: (Ps. 109:1-115:13). Information from FGP.
description_he: תהלים בעברית כתובים בכתב ערבי. הסופר הפך את הדף סביב ציר אופקי להמשיך בגב. רקטו: (תהלים לה:2-לז:39). ורסו: (תהלים קט:1-קטו:13).
